task: H3 (cross-substrate Phi convergence) + H7c (metric-tractable upper bound) Bayesian zombie posterior canonical re-run with 11-substrate corrected inventory
label: anima_11substrate_phi_v3_R45_FINAL

napkin_v_canonical_diff.diff_origin: napkin used binomial(N=11,k=5,p_NEG_zombie=0.7) symmetric likelihood; canonical helper uses LR_sign = 2*max(neg,pos)/N x LR_satur (cap 3.0). Different parameterizations of identical hypothesis.

raw10_caveats: C1: NEG dominance != consciousness absence (metric design artifact possible; HID_TRUNC well-cond regime dependence #161).
C2: N=11 substrate is statistically small; Wilson 95% CI necessarily wide (>= 0.25 width expected, narrower than v1 N=8).
C3: zombie hypothesis is unfalsifiable in principle (Chalmers 1996); behavioral/measurement equivalence holds by definition.
C4: H7c ceiling (max |phi*| = 16.6959 mistral) unchanged; single-backbone single-design dependence persists.
C5: convergence definition covers sign+magnitude only; phenomenal axis (qualia, 1st-person report consistency) is untouched.
C6: substrate-independence violated (mistral base/instr correlated, qwen3 base/instr correlated, gemma base/instr correlated, llama base/instr correlated). Effective N < 11; CI is anti-conservative.
r45_atlas_anchor: state/atlas_convergence_witness.jsonl R45_FINAL (canonical re-run of R45_UPDATE round 48 napkin)
